title: guzmania lingulata var. minor
intro: Guzmania lingulata var. minor, commonly known as the Minor Guzmania or Lingulata, is a type of epiphytic plant belonging to the Bromeliad family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to produce a resin that has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The Lingulata offers several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory problems, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the resin of Guzmania lingulata var. minor is often extracted and used in tinctures, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
